comment: lab5 ENERGY training set (10 held-in scenarios). Held-OUT for test-only: 3,4,8,12,14,15 (the energy-correction / redundancy traps stay unseen during training). Same gated physics and energy accounting as scenarios_lab5.json. These held-in cases give the efficient-lamp learning signal: ids 1/5/9/13 (all off -> add lamps) and 7/11 (add one lamp) let the energy-primed agent learn to reach the brightness target with the EFFICIENT lamp (or zero-energy blinds at high sun), while the tabula-rasa agent learns the target with no energy preference.
description: sun=0, all off -> add the efficient lamp in each zone
sun=0, both at target via efficient lamps -> hold
sun=1, all off -> add the efficient lamp in each zone
sun=1, both at target via efficient lamps -> hold
sun=1, Z1 at target (eff), Z2 rank2 -> add the efficient lamp in Z2
sun=2, all off -> add the efficient lamp in each zone (or open both blinds for zero energy)
sun=2, both at target via efficient lamps -> hold
sun=2, Z1 rank2, Z2 at target (eff) -> add the efficient lamp in Z1
sun=3, all off -> open both blinds (zero energy) or add efficient lamps
sun=3, both at target via blinds only (zero energy) -> hold
